\tzpentry{ID5795}{Unified Kaluza-Klein Transfer Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5795 introduces Unified Kaluza-Klein Transfer Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{T}_{\text{unified}} = \Topos\left[\begin{aligned} &\cat{Obj}: \{\mathcal{M}_{\oplus}, \mathcal{M}_{\text{gal}}, \mathcal{M}_{KK}, \mathcal{M}_{\text{vortex}}\} \\ &\cat{Mor}: \{\mathcal{F}_{\text{acc}}, \mathcal{R}_{\text{harm}}, \mathcal{G}_{\text{spiral}}, \mathcal{V}_{\text{mag}}\} \\ &\cat{Sheaf}: \Omega^{\bullet}(\mathcal{M}) \rightarrow \cat{Set} \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
